task: Parse an AWS CloudFormation template to extract all EC2 instance logical IDs and their instance types
solution_criteria: Solution should read a JSON CloudFormation template, iterate through Resources, filter for Type 'AWS::EC2::Instance', and return a dictionary mapping logical IDs to their InstanceType properties

task: Create a JSON policy document that allows an IAM user to perform read-only operations on S3 buckets matching the pattern 'company-*'
solution_criteria: Solution should be a valid AWS IAM policy with appropriate Action statements (s3:GetObject, s3:ListBucket), Resource ARNs with wildcard matching 'company-*', and Effect set to Allow

task: Write a regex pattern to validate and extract AWS ARN components from a string containing multiple ARNs
solution_criteria: Regex should match valid AWS ARN format (arn:partition:service:region:account-id:resource-type/resource-id) and capture individual components like service, region, account ID, and resource identifier
